title: Documentation, APIs, Licenses, and Generated-Artifact Gates · Gate Lens: Licenses Notices
summary: Keep human and machine contracts synchronized with implementation. Planned artifact: Add and verify the gates licenses notices increment in a documentation and contract drift suite. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Check dependency licenses, attribution, notices, and source obligations.
Test documentation links and executable examples where practical.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
